creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: bdrewery
Date: Fri Oct 16 04:43:18 UTC 2015
New revision: 399420
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/399420

Log:
  Update to 1.2.6.

  Changes:
    - Restrict allowed characters for BE.
    - Fix dataset listing (avoid listing snapshots).
    - Avoid issues with bookmarks.
    - Automatically unmount the BE when activating it.
    - Fix grub not updating for: rename, activate.
    - Generate a new /boot/entropy file for new BE.

  PR:		202965

Changes:
  head/sysutils/beadm/Makefile
  head/sysutils/beadm/distinfo
  head/sysutils/beadm/files/
